scripts.generate:portable-cases: uv --directory python run --extra dev python tools/export_portable_cases.py
scripts.test:python: uv --directory python run --extra dev python -m pytest
scripts.test:parity:python: uv --directory python run --extra dev python -m pytest tests/parity/test_portable_cases.py -q
scripts.test:parity:typescript: npm --workspace typescript exec vitest run test/python-portable-parity.test.ts
scripts.test:parity: npm run generate:portable-cases && npm run test:parity:python && npm run test:parity:typescript
